description: A transaction closed last week. The agent needs to follow up with the client and ask for a review.

nodes.task_description: Identify clients whose transactions closed between 7 and 14 days ago.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the recent client.

nodes.task_description: Send a follow-up email to the client, checking in to see how they are settling in.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a personalized, thoughtful email.

nodes.task_description: In the email, include a link for the client to leave a review on Zillow or Yelp.
